name: Chocolate Mousse3
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate in the top of a double boiler; bring water to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to low; cook, stirring occasionally, until chocolate melts. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. Beat powdered egg whites and water in a large bowl at high speed with an electric mixer until soft peaks form. Gradually add sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
4. Stir one-fourth of the whipped cream into the melted chocolate; stir into egg white mixture. Fold in the remaining whipped cream. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
